creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
My /etc/make.conf looks like this and I think there is nothing unusual
about it, since it worked fine with every other port on 10.0-CURRENT so
far. See below. In the file /usr/local/etc/ports.conf at the very end
of file included, I usually have ports related definitions, like
USE_GCC= for specific ports, but it's empty now since most relevant
ports work for me with CLANG.

But there is an issue with the strict handling of /etc/src.conf which
gets also included by several ports although it is supposed to be world
only. I put it at the very end of these lines. Therein I use some
options unusual for vanilla/plain build. Maybe it reveals something to
you.

/etc/make.conf, portions different from original:

CPUTYPE?=native
CFLAGS+=        -O3


# Force it
#FORCE_MAKE_JOBS=       YES

# Set this to use svn(1) to update your src tree with make update
SVN_UPDATE=             YES
SVN=                    /usr/bin/svn
SVNFLAGS=               -r HEAD


##
##      Force registration of already installed packages
##
FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=     YES

# OpenLDAP
WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL=     yes

# BDB Version
WITH_BDB_VER=           5
WITH_BDB_HIGHEST=       YES

# What PostgreSQL port should be set default
WANT_PGSQL_VER=         93
 
# Wir wollen SAMBA 4
SAMBA_PORT=             samba36
#SAMBA_PORT=            samba4

# KdF an der Optimierung
WITH_OPTIMIZED_FLAGS=   YES

# Disables xf86-video-noveau driver and makes use of newer
libdrm/libGLUT possible #WITHOUT_NOUVEAU=       YES

# New Xorg and Mesa
WITH_NEW_XORG=          YES
WITH_KMS=               YES

# Optional Stack Protector [1] support
#  https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buffer_overflow_protection
WITH_SSP_PORTS=         YES

##
##      PORTS building
##
.include "/usr/local/etc/ports.conf"


/etc/src.conf:

#
CPUTYPE?=               native
#
CFLAGS+=                -O3
# for the kernel
COPTFLAGS+=             -O3
#
CXXFLAGS+=              -std=c++11
#
WITH_CLANG_EXTRAS=      YES
WITH_LLDB=              YES
#
WITH_IDEA=              YES
#
#WITH_BSD_GREP=         YES
WITH_BSD_SORT=          YES
#
#WITH_OFED=             YES
WITH_NAND=              YES
WITH_NMTREE=            YES
WITH_CTF=               YES
#
WITH_SVN=               YES
#
MALLOC_PRODUCTION=      YES
#
PORTS_MODULES=          x11/nvidia-driver
#PORTS_MODULES+=                emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod
